knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw executed well
Appropriate hand switching and single throw technique
Final throw completed with proper hand switching

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well approximated with no visible gaps

technique_summary: Solid performance with proper surgeon's knot followed by appropriate single throws with hand switching. Good suture placement accuracy and complete drain closure. Minor disagreement resolved on phase timings (Teacher A included idle phase, Teacher B had extended suture cut phase) and suture placement deviations (averaged between 3.5mm and 2.5mm total). Both teachers agreed on excellent knot technique with proper hand switching.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise targeting of marks to minimize deviation penalties
Maintain consistent speed while transitioning between phases
strengths: Good knot security and tension maintenance
